description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On Monday, November 27th, a Nuro Prius operating in manual mode was exiting a garage to begin the work day. At the same time, a Nuro 
employee was exiting their personal vehicle in the alley behind the garage. The Nuro Prius made contact with the open door of the 
employee's personal vehicle. No injuries were reported. The employee's personal vehicle had minor damage to the door.
Print
Clear Form
